Issues: The aesthetic (synthwave/retro-futurism) is a highly saturated and popular genre, which can lead to market saturation. To maximize sales, the execution needs to be highly polished to stand out from similar digital art.

While the image is safe, the composition, while standard for a cityscape, lacks a truly unique focal point or novel artistic interpretation to ensure high commercial appeal among buyers looking for highly unique assets.
The overall technical skill and composition are good, but slight improvements in color harmony and line work could elevate the piece from merely good to exceptional.
